title: aa
description:
# Header 1

## Header 2

### Header 3

#### Header 4

##### Header 5 (should have capped size)

Plain text for reference.

**Bold text** and __also bold__.

*Italic text* and _also italic_.

**Bold and _italic_ together**

`inline code`

A [Markdown link](https://cubari.moe) and a plain URL: https://example.com

Another [example link](https://github.com/subject-f/cubari-proxy).

Literal dashes below (should appear as dashes, not a rule):
----
Quotes: "double", 'single'.

Brackets: <angle brackets>.

That’s it! If you see all of the above render with headers, bold, italics, code, and links, Cubari-Flavoured Markdown is working.
